title: IB Chemistry — Higher Level
subject: Chemistry
description: Build atomic-scale intuition across stoichiometry, periodicity, bonding, and energetics. Lab-led every Friday.

title: Mathematics — Higher Level
subject: Mathematics
description: From limits to integration, with weekly proof workshops and exam-style practice.

title: English Literature
subject: English
description: Critical reading across Shakespeare, Atwood, and Achebe, paired with weekly close-reading practice.

title: World History
subject: History
description: 20th-century inflection points: world wars, decolonisation, the Cold War, and the rise of globalisation.

title: Biology — Higher Level
subject: Biology
description: From the cell membrane to ecosystem dynamics. Lab-driven inquiry every other week.

title: Physics — Standard Level
subject: Physics
description: Mechanics, waves, and electricity — taught with intuition before equations.

title: Economics
subject: Economics
description: Micro foundations through macro policy, with weekly case studies on emerging-market economies.

title: Arabic Language & Culture
subject: Arabic
description: Modern Standard Arabic with regional literature, poetry workshops, and rhetoric.
